classifications.phrase: decided to increase the cash rate target by 25 basis points
central forecast is for inflation to decline this year and next
Growth over the next couple of years is expected to be below trend
Household consumption growth has slowed due to the tighter financial conditions
The labour market remains very tight
Wages growth is continuing to pick up in response to the tight labour market
remains alert to the risk of a prices-wages spiral
further tightening of monetary policy will be needed to ensure that inflation returns to target
remains resolute in its determination to return inflation to target

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance on inflation control through rate increases and vigilance against wage-price spirals, while acknowledging dovish growth and employment concerns as the economy slows.
